name: 朱莉娅·纳曼尼
name_full: 朱莉娅·纳曼尼 Giulia Nahmany
introduction: Giulia Nahmany is an Israeli-Romanian actress and producer known for her emotional depth, on-screen elegance, and multilingual versatility. She was born in Kfar Saba, Israel, to a Jewish Ashkenazi family, and from an early age, she knew she wanted to pursue a career in acting. Fluent in English, Hebrew, Romanian, and French, Giulia has built a dynamic career across European and international productions, portraying everything from glamorous leading ladies to complex, emotionally layered characters.Giulia played the lead in the romantic comedy Love by Design, alongside Jane Seymour and David Oakes. The film marked her debut as a producer and earned her the First-Time Filmmaker Award at the Newport Beach Film Festival. She also starred in a powerful Holocaust drama directed by acclaimed Romanian filmmaker Adrian Sitaru, a project she produced as well - underscoring her dedication to meaningful, socially resonant storytelling.Her film work includes Luca, directed by celebrated actor and director Horatiu Malaele, among other diverse roles that continue to expand her international presence. Most recently, Giulia joined the cast of Fjord, the upcoming feature film directed by acclaimed director Cristian Munghiu and starring Sebastian Stan. In the film, set for release in 2026, she plays the role of Ruth.With a passion for storytelling that bridges cultures, languages, and genres, Giulia Nahmany continues to grow as a creative force in global cinema, both in front of and behind the camera.
